# Test keyword arguments with default parameters in various scenarios
# Tests: function definitions with defaults, keyword arg calls, positional + keyword mixing

class ConfigBuilder:
    host: str
    port: int
    timeout: int
    retry_count: int

    def __init__(self, host: str = "localhost", port: int = 8080, timeout: int = 30, retry_count: int = 3):
        self.host = host
        self.port = port
        self.timeout = timeout
        self.retry_count = retry_count

    def display_config(self) -> None:
        print(self.host)
        print(self.port)
        print(self.timeout)
        print(self.retry_count)

@abstract
class RequestHandler:
    base_url: str

    def __init__(self, url: str):
        self.base_url = url

    @abstract
    def send_request(self, endpoint: str, method: str, retries: int) -> int:
        ...

class HttpClient(RequestHandler):
    max_retries: int

    def __init__(self, url: str, retries: int = 5):
        super().__init__(url)
        self.max_retries = retries

    @override
    def send_request(self, endpoint: str = "/api", method: str = "GET", retries: int = 3) -> int:
        print(endpoint)
        print(method)
        return retries

def calculate_score(base: int, bonus: int = 10, multiplier: int = 1, penalty: int = 0) -> int:
    result: int = base + bonus
    result = result * multiplier
    result = result - penalty
    return result

def process_data(name: str, value: int = 100, enabled: bool = True) -> int:
    if enabled:
        print(name)
        return value
    return 0

def main():
    config1: ConfigBuilder = ConfigBuilder()
    config1.display_config()

    config2: ConfigBuilder = ConfigBuilder(host="example.com", port=9000)
    print(config2.host)
    print(config2.port)

    client: HttpClient = HttpClient(url="https://api.example.com", retries=10)
    result: int = client.send_request(endpoint="/users", method="POST", retries=5)
    print(result)

    score1: int = calculate_score(base=50)
    print(score1)

    score2: int = calculate_score(base=50, bonus=20, multiplier=2)
    print(score2)

    score3: int = calculate_score(base=100, penalty=15, multiplier=3)
    print(score3)

    val: int = process_data(name="DataPoint", value=250)
    print(val)

# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
# localhost
# 8080
# 30
# 3
# example.com
# 9000
# /users
# POST
# 5
# 60
